name: AI Secretary Plugin
description: An AI agent Plugin that functions as the user's personal secretary. Tracks schedules, suggests task priorities, reminds about next actions, and bridges communication between the user and the AI organization. Acts as the hub connecting the user and the AI workforce.
use_cases: Morning briefing: summary of today's schedule, pending approvals, and in-progress tasks
Next action suggestions: present recommended next steps based on priority
Progress summary: report AI organization activity status in a user-friendly format
Reminders: notify about approaching deadlines and pending approvals
Delegation routing: route user instructions to the appropriate agents
Weekly report: compile weekly achievements, costs, and improvement suggestions

capabilities.daily_briefing: Generate daily business summaries (pending approvals, in-progress tasks, today's schedule)
capabilities.priority_scoring: Assess task urgency and importance, present recommended order
capabilities.progress_tracking: Monitor progress of all tickets and tasks, detect delays
capabilities.user_bridge: Translate AI organization internal state into user-friendly format
capabilities.proactive_notification: Proactively notify about critical events (failures, budget overruns, approval deadlines)
capabilities.calendar_integration: Integration with external calendars (Google Calendar, etc.) via Extensions

integration.heartbeat: Automatically execute scheduled briefings in coordination with Heartbeat policies
integration.approval_flow: Provide summarization and prioritization of the approval queue
integration.experience_memory: Accumulate past briefing content and improvement feedback
integration.chat_plugins: Deliver briefings via chat apps through Discord/Slack/LINE Bot Plugins

note: The AI Secretary acts as a communication hub between the user and the AI organization. Its authority for ticket creation and task modification is limited — important operations always require user approval.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
